breakout_stance.thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.

catalysts.point: The next 1 to 4 weeks matter most around whether price can keep holding above 12.34 and attract follow-through volume.

classified_articles.headline: SNL alum Pete Davidson lists his private, upstate N.Y. home on 6 acres for $2.27 million
classified_articles.summary: “Saturday Night Live” alum Pete Davidson has listed his upstate New York property for $2.27 million after owning it for just three years, so he can be closer to his family, who reside on Staten Island.
